StringLiteralEqualityCheck.checker_desc: Detects equality operators (== or !=) that have a string literal operand in their expression subtree.

FallThroughCheck.checker_desc: Detects switch case groups that lack a terminating statement (like break, return, throw, or continue) and thus allow execution to "fall through" to the next case, unless a specific comment pattern is present.

MissingSwitchDefaultCheck.checker_desc: Detects switch statements that lack a default case label and are not switch expressions, pattern case labels, or null case labels.

SuperCloneCheck.checker_desc: Detects overriding clone() methods that do not contain a call to super.clone().

EqualsHashCodeCheck.checker_desc: Detects when a class defines an equals method but not a hashCode method, or vice versa.
